intake.user_request: Prerequisite for bulletproof concept #6 (two-grain drop). Stamp headerStatus onto file-grain pseudo-nodes in graph-builder.ts so that output-validator.ts can replace its state.elements iteration with a graph-node file-grain loop. Phase 1 audit found 0/362 file-grain nodes carry headerStatus — this WO fixes that.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Single-site change: one block in graph-builder.ts buildNodes() L281-290. Stamp headerStatus onto file-grain pseudo-node metadata from first matching element. Paired invariant test required (DR-PHASE-7-B). No phases needed.

in_scope: src/pipeline/graph-builder.ts — file-grain pseudo-node emission block (L281-290): look up headerStatus from first matching element for each file, stamp onto metadata
One paired invariant test: assert that graph.json file-grain nodes carry headerStatus after the change
AC-05a 2415===2415 and AC-05b 263===263 PASS at close
out_of_scope: output-validator.ts changes (those belong to the successor WO-RAG-INDEX-TWO-GRAIN-DROP-001 re-open)

constraints: DR-PHASE-7-B locked-additive: the new headerStatus field on file-grain nodes must have a paired invariant test
graph.json node schema must not break existing consumers (headerStatus is optional — already present on element nodes)
Frozen-fixture dual-AC invariants must PASS: AC-05a 2415===2415, AC-05b 263===263
